message:
test(widgets): Add comprehensive tests for textarea, block, padding

- textarea.rs: 35 tests (was 17) - editing, navigation, selection, undo/redo, rendering
- block.rs: 25 tests (was 7) - borders, titles, alignment, border types, edge cases
- padding.rs: 18 tests (was 6) - scissor clipping, stateful render, accessors, edge cases

Part of bd-6e9.9 (Bubbles Widget Test Suite)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
